evals.prompt: We're about to release. Run a security audit on the codebase.
evals.expected_output: Security report with findings by severity (High/Medium/Low). Covers SQL injection, XSS, secrets, auth. File:line references and remediation steps.

evals.prompt: /security-audit src/auth/ - audit our authentication module before we ship
evals.expected_output: Focused security audit of auth module. OWASP-relevant findings. Structured report with severity and remediation.
